历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (including Science) minimum rankings: 2021 approx. 687 → 2022 approx. 798 → 2023 approx. 864 → 2024 approx. 710 → 2025 approx. 586. The trend over the past 5 years shows a fluctuating forward movement, with 2025 moving forward by about 124 places compared to 2024, achieving the best ranking in recent years, indicating continuously intensifying competition for admission; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 2021: 105 → 2022: 54 → 2023: 63 → 2024: 54 → 2025: 47, showing a decreasing trend in recent years; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 86, an increase of 39 (approx. 83%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which theoretically will significantly alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings continuously rising: 2021: 15th → 2023: 14th → 2024: 12th → 2025: 11th → 2026: 11th, firmly among the top universities nationwide, very high level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative', mainly involving the Yang Yun supervisor's ethical misconduct and academic fraud incident, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 56th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 555,000, which is above average among top universities; no obvious record of admission gaps; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 16 disciplines rated A- or above, including 6 A+ disciplines (Aerospace Science and Technology, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literature), and 6 A- disciplines (Mechanics, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Optical Engineering, Mathematics, Transportation Engineering, etc.), with extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Artificial Intelligence and other core majors at Beihang continue to be highly recommended; in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended, Computer Science recommended (67.8), Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended (74.28), strongly attracting candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000, slightly increased from the total of about 297,000 for Physics Category + History Category in 2025, with a basically stable competitive environment; Beihang is located in Beijing, which is cross-province enrollment; Beijing, as a first-tier city, still has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of the 2025 ranking moving forward to 586, the supply shock of a significant 83% expansion in 2026, the sustained appeal of top university level and flagship majors, and the limited impact of negative reputation incidents, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move backward compared to 2025 but to a limited extent. The expansion effect and the university's attractiveness offset each other, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 828, ranging from 729 to 927.

- Artificial Intelligence (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Top-Notch Student Training Plan).

- Aircraft Power Engineering (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Aviation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 729–927, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Computing and Intelligent Science, Microelectronics, Aircraft Power Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics Top-Notch) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Information Science and Technology, Aerospace and Aviation) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<729), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum rankings for History Category: approximately 437 in 2024 → approximately 418 in 2025, with only one major (Social Science Pilot Class) offered in both years, a slight forward shift of about 19 places, indicating slightly intensified competition; enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for History Category: 3 in 2024 → 7 in 2025 → 7 in 2026, with expansion in 2025 and stable supply in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 11th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, top-tier; reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', but mainly involves engineering faculty incidents, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity ranking 56th (relatively hot), overall attention moderately high; Social Science Pilot Class covers economics, administrative management, law, etc., with corresponding disciplines: Foreign Languages and Literature A, Law not independently rated (Beihang Law is not a strong discipline); the university's overall engineering strength has limited driving effect on liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major in 2024 shows differentiation and wait-and-see, finance/banking/economics differentiation and wait-and-see (65.49), liberal arts major popularity overall stable with differentiation; total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, with History Category candidates proportion referencing recent years (2025 History Category 90,087 accounting for 30.3%), estimated 2026 History Category about 91,000, competitive environment basically stable; Beihang is located in Beijing, still has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in the southwest region, but with only one major in History Category and extremely small enrollment, regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 ranking forward trend, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining stable, the limited radiation of the university's top-tier level to liberal arts candidates, and the stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking for History Category will slightly shift forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eases), predicted approximately 418, range 364–464.
